description: Save the black group.  If you choose to fill in white's liberties, please do so on the squared points - this helped me to reduce the number of variations.  Also, please do not take the ko at o5 unless it is absolutely necessary (ie. black is in atari) - this also helped eliminate several variations.  Finally, don't play inside your big eye unless you are capturing at least three stones - this qualifies as a useless move, as white will throw in immediately after.  Good luck!
